scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field0];phone-context=asdf@[field2];phone-context=asdf;transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field1]@[field3];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0];phone-context=asdf@[field2];phone-context=1234 Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Session-Expires: 3600;refresher=uac Min-SE: 600 Call-Info: <sip:10.0.222.133>;method="NOTIFY;Event=telephone-event;Duration=1000" Allow: INVITE,BYE,OPTIONS,CANCEL,ACK,REGISTER,NOTIFY,INFO,REFER,SUBSCRIBE,PRACK,UPDATE,MESSAGE,PUBLISH Max-Forwards: 70 P-Asserted-Identity: <sip:[field1]@[field3]> Contact: "Trunk" <sip:81001001@sbc.com:5060;transport=[transport]> Supported: replaces Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=251511 1313510207 2738 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s= SIP CALL EXTERNAL USER A c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [local_ip] b=AS:1000 t=0 0 m=audio 5080 RTP/AVP 0 127 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:127 telephone-event/8000 a=ptime:20

ACK sip:[field0]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70

BYE [$1] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[field2][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Content-Length: 0 Max-Forwards: 70
